title: Review the uncommitted changes. Context: # Coder Handoff ## Task Review failed: review score 4/10 (min 7) issues to fix: - Then list up to 5 concrete fix items, one per line, using numbered or '-' bullets. - If score >= 7, do not include an issues list. - Format your final line EXACTLY as: SCORE: N/...
summary_text: ISSUES TO FIX: 1. Restore the CJK/prose skip in [eval-skill.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/research-loop/eval-skill.sh#L341) or equivalent, because the rewritten parser now flags Japanese instruction lines inside ```bash``` fences as phantom commands; a line like `次に確認してください` is currently treated as a missing binary. 2. Stop bypassing PATH checks for allowlisted tools in [eval-skill.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/research-loop/eval-skill.sh#L380); the new case statement silently accepts missing commands such as `pm2`/`cmux`, so phantom-command detection no longer catches real broken examples. 3. Treat quoted env-prefix commands as commands, not pure assignments, in [eval-skill.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/research-loop/eval-skill.sh#L347); lines like `FOO="bar" missingcmd --flag` are now skipped entirely, which creates another false negative in the verifier. 4. Add the same `~/.config/freee-mcp/config.json` fallback used in [freee-oauth.mjs](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/bookkeeping/scripts/freee-oauth.mjs#L13) to [freee-client.mjs](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/bookkeeping/scripts/freee-client.mjs#L155); the new hard gate breaks existing freee-mcp setups that keep client credentials in config but not in env vars or Keychain. 5. Drop or ignore machine-generated runtime churn like [experience.jsonl](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/fugue/experience.jsonl) and [.project-init-status](/Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/assets/skills/bookkeeping/scripts/.claude/.project-init-status); these local telemetry/state updates add a lot of review noise and are likely to cause needless conflicts. SCORE: 4/10
